name: Ice Cream Muffins
recipeIngredient: .or regular flour and add 1 tablespoon baking powder and 1 teaspoon salt
2 cups very soft vanilla ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the flour and ice cream into a mixing bowl.
2. Mix only until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Fill greased muffin cups three-fourths full with the batter.
4. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Optionally, vary the flavor of the ice cream and create different flavored muffins by adding 1/2 cup chocolate chips and 1/2 cup chopped nuts to the batter. For added texture, sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.
